_comment: Query-only jobs for workspace/run_lightrag_query.py. The working_dir values must point at graph/vector stores already built by run_lightrag.py.

_knob_notes.query_input_path: JSON/JSONL query records. If set, the fallback question field is ignored.
_knob_notes.output_path: Where query answers and retrieval_list are written. On partial failures a sibling '.errors.json' file is also written.
_knob_notes.mode: Query mode, usually mix for graph + vector retrieval. Also supports local / global / hybrid / naive.
_knob_notes.query.top_k: Number of entities/relations to retrieve from graph branches.
_knob_notes.query.chunk_top_k: Final maximum number of chunks kept after merge/rerank/token filtering.
_knob_notes.max_parallel_queries: Query worker concurrency. Each worker issues ~2 LLM calls per query; they share the global llm_model_max_async semaphore, so true LLM QPS is capped by that value.
_knob_notes.llm_model_max_async: Global LLM concurrency across all query workers (shared semaphore).
_knob_notes.milvus.enable_hybrid_search: Dense+sparse fused retrieval. REQUIRES the working_dir to have been built with milvus.enable_sparse=true, otherwise Milvus rejects the query.
_knob_notes.milvus.enable_sparse: Must be true to query sparse vectors; does not affect whether the working_dir actually contains them. If the build job set enable_sparse=false, flipping this to true here will NOT magically create sparse vectors.
_knob_notes.rerank.enabled: If false, no reranker is attached AND QueryParam.enable_rerank is forced off (no warning spam from LightRAG).
_knob_notes.logging.log_dir: Relative paths resolve against this file's parent directory.
_knob_notes.logging.name: Log filename prefix; actual file is '<name>_<YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS>.log'.
_knob_notes.logging.level: LightRAG log level (DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR).

jobs._note: Hybrid retrieval + rerank. working_dir must have been built with enable_sparse=true.
jobs.name: 2wikimqa_hybrid_rerank

jobs._note: Hybrid retrieval, no rerank. Measures raw hybrid quality without reranker boost.
jobs.name: 2wikimqa_hybrid_no_rerank

jobs._note: Pure dense retrieval + rerank. working_dir does NOT need a sparse column.
jobs.name: 2wikimqa_dense_rerank

jobs._note: Pure dense retrieval, no rerank. Baseline for ablation.
jobs.name: 2wikimqa_dense_no_rerank
